name: Scenario 3: Rejected Non-Formulary Nexium (Expected FAIL - Drug Excluded)
description:
### AI Validation Status: **FAIL**
**Reasoning:**
The claim has been rejected with a reject code of '70' indicating that the product/service is not covered due to being non-formulary. The rejection details do not provide any additional information on how to resolve this issue.

**Possible Root Cause:**
Patient may need to consult their healthcare provider or pharmacist to explore alternative treatment options.
